articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Lettuce at Taco Bell in five states confirmed as source of a diarrhea-causing parasite outbreak - CNBC
articles.description: The CDC warned consumers not to eat shredded iceberg lettuce from Yum Brands' Taco Bell restaurants in Indiana, Kentucky, Michigan, Ohio and West Virginia.
articles.content:
Federal health officials have identified lettuce from Mexico served by Taco Bell locations across five U.S. states as a source of the widespread outbreak of diarrhea-causing parasite cyclospora.
